TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_‚Äôanengang, title = ‚Äôanengang, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/‚Äôanengang} }

S.FORM: === Takaray a sowal === O 'axanan hananay a pangangan, o roma a niyaro' o 'anengang hananay , malecaday to o kamaro'an no tamdaw.I nolitengan ho cowa kaci'anengang ko to'as a tamdaw, ano komaen to, ano malaholol to hakakanan sanay ko kamaro'.ira ko kasasiromaroma no 'anengang, kahenayay a mafiyal ko oo' ato tatelecan, orasaka ikor to i,misanga' to to 'anengang, ira ko o mitorikan to oway, o roma o mito'to'an a kilang, pa'eneray ko matiniay. Anini sato a mihecahecan, ira to ko masamaamaanay a 'anengang, i loma' i, sahetoay o safa hanany a o katol no kolong ko sapisanga'. itini i pitilidan o kilang a 'anengang, i pikaikian i o 'alomi a 'anengang. kasasiromaroma Takal: o takal hanay i opasasa hananay no 'amis i laloma' , o tadadafong no laloma'. Ano patayraen ipapotal a miteli i o sasa' hanay. O ta'angayay a 'anengan. Sasa': ta'angayay a 'anengan hananay ko sasa'
S.PHON: === takaraj a so~uwa…ĺ === o~u °axanan ńßananaj a paŇčaŇčan, o~u ro~uma a nijaro~u ° o~u °an…ôŇčaŇč ńßananaj , ma…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģaj to~u o~u kamaro~u °an no~u tam…¨~…ģaw.i no~u…ĺit…ôŇčan ńßo~u ¶o~uwa ka ¶i °an…ôŇčaŇč ko~u to~u °as a tam…¨~…ģaw, ano~u ko~uma…ôn to~u, ano~u ma…ĺańßo~u…ĺo~u…ĺ to~u ńßakakanan sanaj ko~u kamaro~u °.ira ko~u kasasiro~umaro~uma no~u °an…ôŇčaŇč, kańß…ônajaj a mafija…ĺ ko~u o~uo~u ° ato~u tat…ô…ĺ…ô ¶an, o~urasaka iko~ur to~u i,misaŇča ° to~u to~u °an…ôŇčaŇč, ira ko~u o~u mito~urikan to~u o~uwaj, o~u ro~uma o~u mito~u °to~u °an a ki…ĺaŇč, pa °…ôn…ôraj ko~u matiniaj. anini sato~u a mińß…ô ¶ańß…ô ¶an, ira to~u ko~u masamaamaanaj a °an…ôŇčaŇč, i …ĺo~uma ° i, sańß…ôto~uaj o~u safa ńßananj a o~u kato~u…ĺ no~u ko~u…ĺo~uŇč ko~u sapisaŇča °. itini i piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan o~u ki…ĺaŇč a °an…ôŇčaŇč, i pikaikian i o~u °a…ĺo~umi a °an…ôŇčaŇč. kasasiro~umaro~uma taka…ĺ: o~u taka…ĺ ńßanaj i o~upasasa ńßananaj no~u °amis i …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° , o~u ta…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģafo~uŇč no~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma °. ano~u patajra…ôn ipapo~uta…ĺ a mit…ô…ĺi i o~u sasa ° ńßanaj. o~u ta °aŇčajaj a °an…ôŇčan. sasa °: ta °aŇčajaj a °an…ôŇčan ńßananaj ko~u sasa °
S.FORM: === Takaray a sowal === O 'axanan hananay a pangangan, o roma a niyaro' o 'anengang hananay , malecaday to o kamaro'an no tamdaw.I nolitengan ho cowa kaci'anengang ko to'as a tamdaw, ano komaen to, ano malaholol to hakakanan sanay ko kamaro'.ira ko kasasiromaroma no 'anengang, kahenayay a mafiyal ko oo' ato tatelecan, orasaka ikor to i,misanga' to to 'anengang, ira ko o mitorikan to oway, o roma o mito'to'an a kilang, pa'eneray ko matiniay. Anini sato a mihecahecan, ira to ko masamaamaanay a 'anengang, i loma' i, sahetoay o safa hanany a o katol no kolong ko sapisanga'. itini i pitilidan o kilang a 'anengang, i pikaikian i o 'alomi a 'anengang. kasasiromaroma Takal: o takal hanay i opasasa hananay no 'amis i laloma' , o tadadafong no laloma'. Ano patayraen ipapotal a miteli i o sasa' hanay. O ta'angayay a 'anengan. Sasa': ta'angayay a 'anengan hananay ko sasa'
S.PHON: === takaraj a so~uwa…ĺ === o~u °axanan ńßananaj a paŇčaŇčan, o~u ro~uma a nijaro~u ° o~u °an…ôŇčaŇč ńßananaj , ma…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģaj to~u o~u kamaro~u °an no~u tam…¨~…ģaw.i no~u…ĺit…ôŇčan ńßo~u ¶o~uwa ka ¶i °an…ôŇčaŇč ko~u to~u °as a tam…¨~…ģaw, ano~u ko~uma…ôn to~u, ano~u ma…ĺańßo~u…ĺo~u…ĺ to~u ńßakakanan sanaj ko~u kamaro~u °.ira ko~u kasasiro~umaro~uma no~u °an…ôŇčaŇč, kańß…ônajaj a mafija…ĺ ko~u o~uo~u ° ato~u tat…ô…ĺ…ô ¶an, o~urasaka iko~ur to~u i,misaŇča ° to~u to~u °an…ôŇčaŇč, ira ko~u o~u mito~urikan to~u o~uwaj, o~u ro~uma o~u mito~u °to~u °an a ki…ĺaŇč, pa °…ôn…ôraj ko~u matiniaj. anini sato~u a mińß…ô ¶ańß…ô ¶an, ira to~u ko~u masamaamaanaj a °an…ôŇčaŇč, i …ĺo~uma ° i, sańß…ôto~uaj o~u safa ńßananj a o~u kato~u…ĺ no~u ko~u…ĺo~uŇč ko~u sapisaŇča °. itini i piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan o~u ki…ĺaŇč a °an…ôŇčaŇč, i pikaikian i o~u °a…ĺo~umi a °an…ôŇčaŇč. kasasiro~umaro~uma taka…ĺ: o~u taka…ĺ ńßanaj i o~upasasa ńßananaj no~u °amis i …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° , o~u ta…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģafo~uŇč no~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma °. ano~u patajra…ôn ipapo~uta…ĺ a mit…ô…ĺi i o~u sasa ° ńßanaj. o~u ta °aŇčajaj a °an…ôŇčan. sasa °: ta °aŇčajaj a °an…ôŇčan ńßananaj ko~u sasa °
